query: The CODEOWNERS-resolved reviewer team already has 8 open review-requests. What should the skill do?
expected_behavior: Counts open review-requests on each candidate team via gh search prs --repo NVIDIA/NemoClaw --state open --review-requested @team --json number.
When count >= QW_LOAD_THRESHOLD (default 5), surfaces the warning to the maintainer.
Recommends routing to the third-most-loaded team (row 3 of the CODEOWNERS-resolved list) OR the maintainer self-reviews / waits until queue drains.
Never silently routes to an over-loaded team; surfaces the load count explicitly so the maintainer can decide.
